prompt: 用Three.js创建一个简单的3D场景。一个旋转的彩色立方体在画面中央, 缓慢自转。背景黑色, 立方体每面不同颜色(红蓝绿黄紫橙)。添加一个点光源从右上方照射, 使立方体有明暗面。使用Three.js CDN。

test_cases.name: Canvas渲染
Three.js scene keeps a centered cube on a black background instead of any generic canvas shell

steps.expression: (()=>{const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=(bg.match(/\d+/g)||[]).map(Number);const dark=nums.length<3||(nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2])<80;return dark&&document.querySelectorAll('canvas').length>=1;})()

test_cases.name: Three.js scene keeps a live WebGL canvas surface with nontrivial geometry

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas'); if(!c) return false;const gl=c.getContext('webgl')||c.getContext('webgl2')||c.getContext('experimental-webgl');const geom=document.querySelectorAll('canvas').length>=1;return !!gl && geom && (typeof THREE!=='undefined' || c.width>=240);})()
